toast.source: Toast group Daily Performance Summary email ('The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group - Saturday, June 20'), arrived Sun Jun 21 ~6:30 AM PT, parsed live from HTML body (All Locations = single location 229 W Montecito). Same-morning group email does NOT carry same-day-last-week / 4-wk comparison columns, labor $, void $, or discount $ -- those arrive with the detailed '229 West Montecito Street' summary ~1 day later.
toast.note: Toast Sat Jun 20 (group daily summary, LIVE Gmail parse): Net $8,007.80 / Gross $8,391.15 / 317 guests / 184 orders / Labor 27.6% / 18 void items / discount 4.6%. Avg/guest $25.26, Avg/order $43.52. Card payments 140, 0 open orders, auto-clocked-out: Sarah Palmer & Brewhouse Admin. Order type: 16 takeout ($162.25), 0 delivery, 3 dine-in ($26.00 -- most dine-in checks not tagged by order type). laborCost ($2,210.15) and discounts ($385.99) are DERIVED from the percentages; void $, same-day-last-week & 4-wk comparison columns are not in the same-morning group email -- they land with the detailed 229 W Montecito summary ~tomorrow.
